name: Giulia - CFA-44 Nosferatu (Emmerian Air Force)
description:
A sweet, flirty soul. A big fan of Talisman's, stationed at Gracemeria Air Force Base. Taken on her own free will from the Estovakians during the Emmerian-Estovakian War.

Inspiration taken from ACE COMBAT®.

ACE COMBAT®, ACE COMBAT® 6: FIRES OF LIBERATIONTM, and the CFA-44 Nosferatu are all registered trademarks of BANDAI NAMCO LTD.
creator: TheAverageHelixFan
